description_long: This is a double-decker open-top tour bus with a vintage design, featuring a prominent front grille, rounded fenders, and large headlamps. The bus is decorated with colorful graphics and the phrase 'WINGS OVER EUROPE' along both sides, suggesting it is used for sightseeing tours. The upper deck is open with two rows of green seats visible, while the lower deck has large rectangular windows and a single passenger entry door on the side. The rear of the bus displays a stylized winged emblem and additional tour information. The exterior is primarily dark blue with red, yellow, and white accents, and the wheels are metallic with visible hubcaps. The bus appears to be constructed mainly from metal, with glass windows and rubber tires.
description: A vintage-style, open-top double-decker tour bus with colorful 'WINGS OVER EUROPE' graphics, open upper seating, and a single side entry door. The exterior is dark blue with red, yellow, and white accents and features a winged emblem on the rear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large windshield, prominent grille, headlamps, and partial view of the open upper deck.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the 'WINGS OVER EUROPE' sign, large side windows, single passenger door, and open upper deck seating.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the winged emblem, tour information, and the open upper deck with two rows of seats.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with similar graphics, large windows, and open upper deck, but no visible passenger door.
attribute_window_arrangement: The bus has a row of large, rectangular windows along each side of the lower deck, evenly spaced and separated by vertical pillars. The upper deck is open with no side windows.
attribute_bus_manufacturer_logo: A stylized winged 'W' emblem is present on the front and rear, with the text 'WINGS OVER EUROPE' and 'WINGS' visible.
